use_cases: Display user profile pictures in navigation or settings
Show user avatars in comment sections or social feeds
Provide fallback initials when images fail to load
Represent users in lists or card components
ai_summary: A lightweight avatar component built on Radix UI primitives with support for images and fallback text. Exports three sub-components (Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback) for flexible composition. Styled with Tailwind CSS for clean, minimal aesthetics suitable for any application requiring user representation.
